# ===============================
# Redirect HTTP to HTTPS
# ===============================
server {
    listen 80 default_server;
    listen [::]:80 default_server;
    server_name scan.job200.com;

    return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
}

# ===============================
# HTTPS Server
# ===============================
server {
    listen 443 ssl http2;
    listen [::]:443 ssl http2;
    server_name scan.job200.com;

    # SSL Certificates (Generated by Certbot)
    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/scan.job200.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/scan.job200.com/privkey.pem;

    # Recommended SSL Settings
    ssl_protocols TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3;
    ssl_prefer_server_ciphers on;

    # Allow Large File Uploads (200MB)
    client_max_body_size 200M;

    # Increase timeouts for large resume uploads
    proxy_read_timeout 300;
    proxy_connect_timeout 300;
    proxy_send_timeout 300;

    # Static Files
    location /static/ {
        alias /root/Job200/staticfiles/;
    }

    # Django via Gunicorn socket
    location / {
        include proxy_params;
        proxy_pass http://unix:/root/Job200/gunicorn.sock;
    }
}
